title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 545.500 - Order for removal shall specify what
text:
545.500.  Order for removal shall specify what. — Every order for the removal of any cause under the foregoing provisions shall state whether the same is made on the application of the party, or on facts within the knowledge of the court or judge, and shall specify the cause of removal and designate the county to which the cause is removed.
(RSMo 1939 § 4020) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 3631; 1919 § 3974; 1909 § 5181
